tools.name: nerve_info
tools.description: Get Nerve chain info (chainId, assetId, symbol, addressPrefix, consensus assets, etc.)

tools.name: nerve_get_latest_height
tools.description: Get the latest main chain block height for a chain

tools.name: nerve_get_best_block_header
tools.description: Get the latest block header (hash, height, txCount, packingAddress, etc.)

tools.name: nerve_validate_address
tools.description: Validate if a Nerve address is correct for the given chain

tools.name: nerve_get_account_balance
tools.description: Query account balance for a specific asset (chainId, assetChainId, assetId, address)

tools.name: nerve_get_balance_list
tools.description: Query balance list for an address and optional asset IDs

tools.name: nerve_get_block_by_height
tools.description: Get block (header + transactions) by block height

tools.name: nerve_get_block_by_hash
tools.description: Get block (header + transactions) by block hash

tools.name: nerve_get_header_by_height
tools.description: Get block header only by height

tools.name: nerve_get_agent_list
tools.description: Get list of consensus nodes (agents) for the chain

tools.name: nerve_get_deposit_list
tools.description: Get delegation list for a consensus node (by agent creation tx hash)

tools.name: nerve_jsonrpc
tools.description: Call any Nerve JSON-RPC method by name with params array. Use for methods not covered by dedicated tools (e.g. getRandomSeedByCount, getProposalInfo, swap/farm APIs).

tools.name: nerve_rest
tools.description: Call Nerve REST API by path. Method GET by default; pass body for POST. Base URL is from NERVE_API_BASE_URL (default https://api.nerve.network). Example paths: api/info, api/block/header/height/1000, api/tx/{hash}

findings.description: Parameter 'path' accepts arbitrary file paths without validation
